title: uva-ursi glandulosa
intro: Uva-ursi glandulosa, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the northern hemisphere. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and astringent properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and combat infections. The health benefits of uva-ursi glandulosa include its ability to soothe urinary tract issues, such as UTIs and incontinence, as well as its potential to help manage conditions like hemorrhoids and eczema. Uva-ursi glandulosa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and can be found in various herbal supplements and remedies.
